Center: US National Nuclear Data Center, Brookhaven, USA
ref: Jour: Physical Review, Part C, Nuclear Physics, Vol.110, p.024313 (2024)
title: Extraction of Gamow-Teller strengths in the beta+ direction with the (d,2He) reaction in inverse kinematics

x4freetext: Extraction of Gamow-Teller strengths in the beta+
direction with the (d,2He) reaction in inverse
kinematics

x4codes.shortRef: Jour: Physical Review, Part C, Nuclear Physics, Vol.110, p.024313 (2024)

x4codes.hlp: Michigan State University, East Lansing, MI, United States of America
Argonne National Laboratory, Argonne, IL, United States of America

x4freetext: Universidade da Coruna, Campus Industrial de
Ferrol, CITENI, Departamento de Fisica, Ferrol 15403,
Spain

x4codes.hlp: Michigan State University, East Lansing, MI, United States of America

x4freetext: The Coupled Cyclotron Facility at NSCL.
The active target-time projection chamber (AT-TPC)
was used at the target location of the S800
spectrograph.
The AT-TPC has a cylindrical geometry with a 52 cm
diameter and an active length of 100 cm along the
beam direction. For this experiment, it was filled
with deuterium gas at a pressure of 530 Torr,
corresponding to a target thickness of 11.7 mg/cm2.
The time-of-flight (ToF) between the two
scintillators placed at the exit of A1900 separator
and the entrance of the beam line towards the S800
spectrograph was used to separate the different
components in the beam.

x4code.headerHelp: Error in value of quantity, defined under ERR-ANALYS

x4freetext: The uncertainties in the cross sections
include statistical uncertainties and systematic
uncertainties. The latter are dominated by
uncertainties in the beam integration and the
acceptance corrections for the two protons in the
AT-TPC and the residual particles in the S800
spectrograph. Except for the strongly excited states
at 3.68 MeV in 13C and 3.95 MeV in 14N, the
statistical uncertainties are larger than the
systematic uncertainties.
Approved by Z.Rahman on March 10, 2025.
BP

x4headers.headerHelp: Upper limit of angular range, c.m. system

x4freetext: The data are integrated over a limited window of
relative energy between the two protons.
